query_name:
SELECT
  asceding.rnk,
  i1.i_product_name AS best_performing,
  i2.i_product_name AS worst_performing
FROM (
    SELECT
      *
    FROM (
        SELECT
          item_sk,
          RANK() OVER (ORDER BY rank_col ASC) AS rnk
        FROM (
            SELECT
              ss_item_sk AS item_sk,
              AVG(ss_net_profit) AS rank_col
            FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS ss1
            WHERE
              ss_store_sk = 4
            GROUP BY
              ss_item_sk
            HAVING
              AVG(ss_net_profit) > 0.9 * (
                  SELECT
                    AVG(ss_net_profit) AS rank_col
                  FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
                  WHERE
                    ss_store_sk = 4 AND ss_addr_sk IS NULL
                  GROUP BY
                    ss_store_sk
              )
        ) AS V1
    ) AS V11
    WHERE
      rnk < 11
) AS asceding, (
    SELECT
      *
    FROM (
        SELECT
          item_sk,
          RANK() OVER (ORDER BY rank_col DESC) AS rnk
        FROM (
            SELECT
              ss_item_sk AS item_sk,
              AVG(ss_net_profit) AS rank_col
            FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS ss1
            WHERE
              ss_store_sk = 4
            GROUP BY
              ss_item_sk
            HAVING
              AVG(ss_net_profit) > 0.9 * (
                  SELECT
                    AVG(ss_net_profit) AS rank_col
                  FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_freq/store_sales/*.parquet') AS store_sales
                  WHERE
                    ss_store_sk = 4 AND ss_addr_sk IS NULL
                  GROUP BY
                    ss_store_sk
              )
        ) AS V2
    ) AS V21
    WHERE
      rnk < 11
) AS descending, READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/item/*.parquet') AS i1, READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/item/*.parquet') AS i2
WHERE
  asceding.rnk = descending.rnk
  AND i1.i_item_sk = asceding.item_sk
  AND i2.i_item_sk = descending.item_sk
ORDER BY
  asceding.rnk
LIMIT 100

extra_info.Projections: RANK() OVER (ORDER BY rank_col ASC NULLS LAST)

Projections: CASE  WHEN ((#1 > 1)) THEN ("error"('More than one row returned by a subquery used as an expression - scalar subqueries can only return a single row.
Use "SET scalar_subquery_error_on_multiple_rows=false" to revert to previous behavior of returning a random row.')) ELSE #0 END
